perf_hint: one history sample and five bodies per pixel — comparable to `nebula`; on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: scale
params.description: How wide the whole orbital system spreads.

params.name: speed
params.description: How fast the innermost body circles, in revolutions per second.

params.name: swell
params.description: How far a band's loudness pushes its body outward.

params.name: body_size
params.description: How wide a body's lit core is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: trail
params.description: How much of the previous frame survives: the length of the comet tails.

params.name: curl
params.description: How hard the tails bend with the orbits; negative bends them against.

params.name: flash
params.description: How brightly a hit flashes every body at once.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the system.
